description: A neurosurgical team needs a 3D-printable model of the cranial bone for pre-operative planning from the CT Cranium DICOM scan loaded in InVesalius 3. Create a 3D surface mesh of the skull using an appropriate Hounsfield Unit threshold for cortical bone and export the result as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/skull_model.stl. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
